runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (16.89) at this track in a P5, finishing fourth and beaten 1.3 lengths. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from two starts. Makes strong appeal.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (26.55) when eighth over 457m at Q Lakeside in a Restricted WIN. Super consistent from the draw with a win and four places from five starts. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels and became unbalanced leaving the first turn.

runners.formComment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 3 lengths behind Zabdon Skippy over 300m. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

runners.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 2.75 lengths second (28.13) over 484m at Casino. Has been thereabouts of late and is among the chances.
